articles.title: July 18, 2026 – US-Iran war news - CNN
articles.description: There’s no sign that renewed fighting between the US and Iran will end soon. A week of intensified strikes has left the ceasefire in tatters.

articles.title: Taylor Farms lettuce sample tests positive for Cyclospora as recall expands - Fox Business
articles.description: A shredded iceberg lettuce sample from Taylor Farms de Mexico tested positive for the cyclospora parasite as the company expanded its nationwide recall.

articles.title: Hungary's president signs amendment ending his own term - DW.com
articles.description: An ally of former PM Viktor Orban has signed a constitutional amendment ending his own term as head of state. Tamas Sulyok criticized the law, while lawmakers insist he has impeded national progress by staying in office.

articles.title: Nolan Wells Not First Person to Drown Off Horn Island Coast, Local Says - TMZ
articles.description: Nolan Wells' family may not be convinced he drowned off the coast of Horn Island ... but some of the area locals say they wouldn't be surprised -- because the waters have claimed other lives.

articles.title: Rep. Ralph Norman launches campaign to replace Lindsey Graham in Senate race - NBC News
